SCROLL

WHY RIDGE

01

High Throughput

Built for enterprise scale with sub-second finality.

02

EVM Compatible

Deploy existing contracts seamlessly with zero rewrites.

03

Institutional Security

Bank-grade compliance and configurable permissioning.

04

Native Interop

Trustless bridging across the Ridge sub-network topology.
